title: Vaśīkaraṇa-karma
century: Medieval (c. 7th–14th c.); commentarial tradition to 18th c.
description: The second of the six ṣaṭ-karma — the subjugation (*vaśīkaraṇa*) rite for bringing a person, force, or circumstance under the practitioner's influence. High caution — an *ugra*-category ṣaṭ-karma that acts on another's will. Preserved here as heritage / source material. Not instructional.
